opportunities.title: [OSS] Vaibhav-kesarwani/100-reactjs-projects: Add /dashboard Route for Better Project & Contribution Management
opportunities.description:
## Feature Request

### Problem
Currently, the website lacks a centralized **dashboard page** where users/contributors can easily view project-related information, contribution progress, and useful repository insights in one place.

A dedicated `/dashboard` route would improve usability and provide a more organized experience for contributors and users.

### Proposed Solution
Create a **`/dashboard` route** that acts as a centralized hub for project and contribution-related information.

### Suggested Features
The dashboard can include sections like:

#### UI Suggestions
- Responsive modern UI
opportunities.llm_fit_note: [OK] Open-source contribution opportunity aligning with React and UI design strengths. | wins: rubios_perf, a11y_wcag, complex_ui

opportunities.title: [OSS] lingdojo/kana-dojo: [Good First Issue] 🏯 Add new Anime Quote 52 - Beginner-Friendly Open-source Contribution

## 🟢 Good First Issue: Add Anime Quote #52 — Beginner-Friendly Open Source Contribution
